history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my location. Directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I will turn right to face the open floor cell next to me in column E, row 7, enabling me to move towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal at row 05 column B, which is to the left and slightly ahead of my current position. Directly in front of me (row 06, column D) is a safe floor cell, but to reach the goal, I need to move towards the left. Currently, the cell to my left contains lava, so moving left is unsafe. To approach the goal, I should turn left to face it and then move forward towards safe cells closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column F, and I am facing forward at row 07 column D. The cell directly in front has a wall (#), so moving forward is not possible. I should turn left or right to find a path. Turning right will have me face the free floor cell to my right at row 07 column E. This looks like the best option to avoid the wall and approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05 column B, two cells forward and one cell to the left from my current position. The cell directly ahead is a lava cell, which is dangerous to move into. To approach the goal safely, I need to change direction to my left so I can move towards the safer floor cells leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at row 05 column F. I am currently facing forward at row 07 column D. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. I should turn right to face east, where there might be a safer path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I see the goal at row 05, column B, which is to my left and slightly forward from my current position at (row 07, column D). Moving forward is blocked by a wall cell (#), so I cannot move forward. Turning left will face me towards the column with the goal and potentially open up a path to reach it safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is visible two cells ahead and two cells to the right of my current position. Directly in front of me is a lava cell, which is dangerous to enter. To reach the goal safely, I need to avoid moving forward into lava. Turning right will face me toward a safe floor cell on my right, making it a better option to start moving towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal (G) is visible at row 05, column B, to the left of my current position at row 07, column D. I am currently facing forward, where there is a wall (#). To reach the goal, I need to turn left to face towards the goal since moving forward is blocked by a wall.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at position 05F, two cells above and three cells to the right. Currently, I am facing upward towards 06D which is lava, so I cannot move forward safely. To get closer to the goal without stepping into lava, I will turn right to face towards the open space on my right side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal `G` is visible at position B5, to my left relative to my current position at D7. There is a wall `#` at E7 and E6 blocking the forward path and the direct right side. Moving forward is blocked by a wall, so I cannot move ahead. I will turn left to face towards the goal, which is to my left relative to my current orientation.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is located at row 05, column F, which is two rows above and three columns ahead of me. However, I see that directly in front of me is a floor cell, and to my right there is also open floor. The lava cells are further ahead but not immediately blocking my forward path. I should move forward toward the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
